meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use SaaS pricing strategies to overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for fast, professional results.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect portfolio to land high-paying clients. By productizing a SaaS pricing dashboard, you demonstrate immediate business value. Use Antigravity to scaffold the UI and Claude Code to implement dynamic pricing logic, turning a technical demo into a compelling case study that proves your ROI-focused expertise.
content.intro:
The blank page of a portfolio is the silent killer of freelance careers. You have the technical skills, but without a track record, clients see a risk rather than a solution. The secret isn't more filler projects; it's building a high-impact, functional tool that solves a universal business headache: SaaS pricing.

By building a production-ready pricing engine, you shift the conversation from 'what have you done?' to 'how much revenue can you help me generate?' This guide leverages modern AI-assisted engineering to help you ship a professional-grade asset that proves your worth to any stakeholder in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Define the Architecture
steps.description: Establish the foundation of your pricing model using a clean, scalable data structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component structure for a SaaS pricing page with three tiers, using Tailwind CSS for a modern, enterprise look.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a JSON schema for a subscription pricing model including monthly/yearly toggles.'

steps.title: Implement Pricing Logic
steps.description: Build the backend calculation logic to handle discounts and plan upgrades dynamically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript function to calculate annual savings based on a 20% discount rate against monthly billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file pricing.ts --apply 'Add logic for currency formatting and tax calculation based on locale.'

steps.title: Integrate Conversion Triggers
steps.description: Add UI elements that nudge users toward the high-value 'Pro' tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a 'Most Popular' badge component with a subtle pulse animation for the middle pricing tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add an interactive hover state to the pricing cards that increases scale and adds a drop shadow.'

steps.title: State Management for Checkout
steps.description: Ensure the UI reflects the user's selection accurately before sending data to the payment processor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a React context provider to handle selected pricing plan state and pass it to a checkout summary component.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file store.ts --apply 'Implement state persistence for the selected plan using localStorage.'

steps.title: Documentation & Deployment
steps.description: Package the project as a case study for your portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README.md template specifically for a SaaS pricing module, highlighting technical stack and business problem solved.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a list of 5 key metrics this pricing tool tracks for the user to include in their portfolio.'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Contact Sales' button for the Enterprise tier to simulate real-world B2B workflows.
Use CSS variables for your primary brand colors to allow for instant re-skinning when showing the project to different clients.
Include a 'Comparison Table' modal that reveals hidden features, which shows you understand complex UX/UI requirements.
Hardcode a 'Currency Switcher' to show global scalability—clients love seeing that their tool is international-ready.
Never show just the code; always record a 30-second loom video of the pricing toggle in action to embed in your portfolio.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing engine is deployed, host it on Vercel and link it directly to your GitHub repo as a 'Featured Project' to maximize visibility.
content.conversion_block: You now have a portfolio-ready asset that demonstrates real engineering depth. Don't stop at one project; iterate, refine, and start landing your first paying clients today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
